title: triticum durum subsp. abyssinicum
intro: Triticum durum subsp. abyssinicum, also known as Abyssinian wheat or Durum wheat, is a subspecies of the Durum wheat plant native to Ethiopia. It possesses medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Triticum durum subsp. abyssinicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
